prompt: List all the privilege-escalation to-admin scenarios that are currently deployed and ready to demo. For any that are enabled but not yet deployed, tell me what I need to do.

assertions.name: uses_category_and_target_flags
assertions.description: Uses --category privilege-escalation and --target to-admin filter flags (or equivalent)

assertions.name: explains_4_state_status
assertions.description: Correctly explains the 4-state status system (deployed+enabled=green/ready, enabled+not-deployed=yellow/pending, etc.)

assertions.name: correct_action_for_pending
assertions.description: Recommends 'plabs deploy -y' for scenarios that are enabled but not yet deployed

assertions.name: no_deploy_without_y
assertions.description: Does NOT suggest running plabs deploy without a non-interactive flag (-y or --auto-approve)

assertions.name: uses_plabs_status_or_list
assertions.description: Uses plabs status OR plabs scenarios list to check current state
